data.title: Big Ten Tournament and March Madness "Hot Market" DTF Printing with Campus Ink
data.description: In Irvine, California, on April 1, 2026, Steven Farag, the CEO of Campus Ink and NIL Store, a seasoned figure in college sports apparel, has been making waves. Since NIL Store's establishment within Campus Ink in 2021, the company has successfully secured licensing agreements with over 160 colleges and universities.

data.title: Wheaton Precious Metals Announces Closing of Silver Stream with BHP on Antamina
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 1, 2026, Wheaton Precious Metals™ Corp. shared news that its subsidiary, Wheaton Precious Metals International Ltd. ("WPMI"), has successfully finalized a silver stream transaction as per earlier reports. This move signifies a significant milestone for the company.
New Zealand Prime Minister Christopher Luxon on Thursday appointed Chris Penk as defence minister in a Cabinet reshuffle, handing a former naval officer responsibility for the armed forces.

data.title: In HelloNation, Plumbing Expert Gary Kowalke Explains Indoor Humidity for Seasonal Home Comfort
data.description: As the seasons transition from winter to spring in Baraboo, Wisconsin, it is important for homeowners to consider the impact on indoor humidity levels for comfort and air quality. HelloNation recommends aiming for a specific humidity level as the weather changes. The article provides practical tips to maintain indoor comfort and air quality during this period.

data.title: US officials now combat foreign disinformation they previously ignored, as Iran conflict highlights the importance of defense.
data.description: Experts and officials are emphasizing the necessity to build a defense against foreign influence campaigns amidst the ongoing conflict in Iran.
Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Minnesota Reports Financial Results for 2025

data.title: Clairvest Announces the Sale of Star Waste Systems to Casella Waste Systems, Inc.
data.description: Today, Clairvest Group Inc. (TSX: CVG) revealed the sale of their shares in Star Waste Systems, LLC along with Clairvest Equity Partners VI. The transaction involved the equity holders of Star Waste and the total acquisition was done by Casella Waste Systems, Inc. The specific financial details of the deal were not disclosed.

data.title: HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding Launches Guided Missile Destroyer George M. Neal (DDG 131)
data.description: In Pascagoula, Mississippi, on April 01, 2026, HII’s Ingalls Shipbuilding division accomplished a significant milestone by launching the future USS George M. Neal (DDG 131). This marks the construction progress of the fourth Flight III Arleigh Burke-class destroyer at the shipyard. The vessel's successful launch signifies a key advancement in the project.

data.title: Franklin Group Expands Leadership Team to Drive Growth and Operational Excellence
data.description: In Virginia Beach on April 1, 2026, Franklin Group revealed the addition of three key members to its executive leadership team. Jason Drane is appointed as the Senior Vice President overseeing Growth and Innovation, Katherine Vance assumes the role of Vice President responsible for Compliance, and Erin Ruane joins in a yet undisclosed position.

data.title: Havila Shipping ASA: Petition received to register arrest in certain assets
data.description: In a stock exchange notice from December 12, 2025, it was announced that several companies within the group had been informed by DNB Bank ASA, Swedbank AB (publ), and Danske Bank A/S NUF about their intent to pursue legal action in order to secure their purported claim. This decision came after a judgement was issued by Oslo city court on December 8, 2025.

data.title: FCPT Announces Acquisition of a Chili's Property for $2.3 Million
data.description: A real estate investment trust, Four Corners Property Trust (FCPT), recently purchased a Chili's property for $2.3 million. The property, situated in Illinois, is part of a bustling retail area and is operated by the corporate under a triple net lease with about six years remaining on the term. FCPT specializes in owning and acquiring high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties, with a focus on stable and profitable investments. This acquisition further strengthens FCPT's portfolio and presence in the commercial real estate market.

data.title: US Treasury requests feedback on state stablecoin rules as dollar-pegged stablecoins approach $300B market cap.
data.description: The Treasury recently released a notice outlining proposed rulemaking, coinciding with the market capitalization of stablecoins pegged to the US dollar nearing the $300 billion mark.

data.title: $80M bet by Hyperliquid whale predicts market crash, causing concern for Bitcoin. Trader has history of losses.
data.description: A large investor on the Hyperliquid decentralized exchange (DEX) has recently made a bold prediction by wagering $80 million on the decline of Bitcoin and the surge of oil prices. This investor, often referred to as a "whale" due to their significant holdings, has a track record of losing millions in similar trades in the past. The size of the bet raises eyebrows within the financial community, as it indicates a high level of confidence in their market analysis despite past losses.

data.title: USA Digital Rebrands as APIO to Reflect the Future of Business Connectivity
data.description: In Oklahoma City on April 1, 2026, APIO, a reputable provider of connectivity and communication solutions, revealed its rebranding from USA Digital. This change signifies the company's growth and dedication to offering up-to-date connectivity services.

data.title: Expro Announces Proposed Redomicile to the Cayman Islands
data.description: Houston-based Expro Group Holdings N.V. (NYSE: XPRO) has revealed plans to relocate its corporate domicile from the Netherlands to the Cayman Islands. The decision, unanimously approved by the Board of Directors, aims to bolster the company's long-term success and benefit its stakeholders. The move is intended to create a more favorable environment for the business and enhance shareholder value.

data.title: Richmond American Announces New Community in Las Vegas
data.description: Eldorado Springs presents meticulously crafted residences in a sought-after area in LAS VEGAS as of April 1, 2026. Richmond American Homes of Nevada, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc., proudly declares the launch of Eldorado Springs.
